title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.932 - Political subdivisions may make more stringent rules
text:
407.932.  Political subdivisions may make more stringent rules. — Nothing in sections 407.925 to 407.932 shall prohibit local political subdivisions from enacting more stringent ordinances or rules.
(L. 1992 S.B. 509, et al. § 14)
